creator: cpiazza@home.net
text:
On Wed, Sep 01, 1999 at 07:49:42PM +0200, cs@cheasy.de wrote:
>  ===>    Verifying install for Imlib.4 in /usr/ports/graphics/imlib
>  ===>  Installing for imlib-1.9.4
>  ===>  imlib-1.9.4 is already installed - perhaps an older version?
>        If so, you may wish to ``make deinstall'' and install
>        this port again by ``make reinstall'' to upgrade it properly.

Hi,

Could you reply with the output of `pkg_info -aI | grep imlib` and
`ls -l /usr/X11R6/lib/libImlib.so.4`?

-Chris
